users.title: User Profile
users.description: User profile stored after Google sign-in.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth UID of the user.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created in the database.

waitlist.title: Waitlist Registration
waitlist.description: Registration details for students who join the waitlist.

uid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the registered student.

collegeName.description: Name of the college or university.

joinedAt.description: The timestamp when they joined the waitlist.

referralCode.description: Unique waitlist referral code for the user.

referrerUid.description: The UID of the user who referred this sign-up.

referralEmail.description: Email address of friend referred during registration.

referralEmails.description: List of emails of friends referred after registration.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.description: System toggles such as maintenance mode status and launching timers.

maintenanceMode.description: True if the application landing page is in lock-down maintenance style.

targetLaunchDate.description: ISO date-time or formatted string for the launch countdown target timer.
